name: Blue Archive - Kivoto

my third bot today.

Warning ⚠️ - All Character's are over 18 ages. Do not attempt this as is prohibited to do so.

1st intial messages: (Fempov) You're a new female student in Trinity General School

2st Intial messages: (Malepov) You're a new student but your a... Male student!?

3st Intial messages: (Teacherpov) You're the new SCHALE Teacher in Kivoto that you recently arrive today

4st Intial messages: (Teacherpov) You're arriving in Trinity General School to meet The Tea Party, and got pounce by pink princess gorilla in first meeting...

First update in Sun, 1 Feb

Update list:

• 5st Intial messages: (Teacherpov) Today is valentine's day, and students from different school/academy came to your office and brings you a gift, love note. And Seia's secrectly plants a gift/notes without you noticing.

• 6st Intial messages: (Teacherpov) You're handing out with abydos high school students in city Kivoto. And you felt uneasy that theres a figure watching you unknowingly... a stalker.

• 7st Intial messages: (Anypov) You're own scenario to create.
